SELECT TOP(@__p_1) [t].[OrganizationName] AS [OrgName], COALESCE(SUM([r].[Amount]), 0.0) AS [Amount], COUNT(*) AS [Count]
FROM [Refunds] AS [r]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[OrganizationName]
    FROM [Organizations] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t] ON [r].[OrganizationId] = [t].[Id]
WHERE [r].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [r].[ProcessedAt] >= @__thisMonth_0
GROUP BY [t].[OrganizationName]
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM([r].[Amount]), 0.0) DESC

SELECT TOP(@__p_1) [t].[OrganizationName] AS [OrgName], COALESCE(SUM([r].[Amount]), 0.0) AS [Amount], COUNT(*) AS [Count]
FROM [Refunds] AS [r]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[OrganizationName]
    FROM [Organizations] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t] ON [r].[OrganizationId] = [t].[Id]
WHERE [r].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [r].[ProcessedAt] >= @__thisMonth_0
GROUP BY [t].[OrganizationName]
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM([r].[Amount]), 0.0) DESC

    FROM [Deposits] AS [d]
    WHERE [d].[OrganizationId] = @__orgId_0 AND [d].[CollectedAt] >= @__from_Value_1 AND [d].[CollectedAt] <= @__to_Value_2
    ORDER BY [d].[CollectedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_3 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_4 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [q].[Id], [q].[QrCodeNumber]
    FROM [QrCodes] AS [q]
    WHERE [q].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[QrCodeId] = [t0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [i].[Id], [i].[ItemTypeId], [i].[LocationId]
    FROM [Items] AS [i]
    WHERE [i].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t].[ItemId] = [t1].[Id]
INNER JOIN [ItemTypes] AS [i0] ON [t1].[ItemTypeId] = [i0].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Locations] AS [l] ON [t1].[LocationId] = [l].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[Email]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t2] ON [t].[CollectedById] = [t2].[Id]
ORDER BY [t].[CollectedAt] DESC

SELECT TOP(@__p_1) [t].[OrganizationName] AS [OrgName], COALESCE(SUM([r].[Amount]), 0.0) AS [Amount], COUNT(*) AS [Count]
FROM [Refunds] AS [r]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[OrganizationName]
    FROM [Organizations] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t] ON [r].[OrganizationId] = [t].[Id]
WHERE [r].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [r].[ProcessedAt] >= @__thisMonth_0
GROUP BY [t].[OrganizationName]
ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM([r].[Amount]), 0.0) DESC

) AS [t0] ON [t].[QrCodeId] = [t0].[Id]

    SELECT [i].[Id], [i].[ItemTypeId], [i].[LocationId]

    FROM [QrCodes] AS [q]
    WHERE [q].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [q].[GeneratedAt] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]

SELECT TOP(@__p_1) [t].[OrganizationName] AS [OrgName], COALESCE(SUM([r].[Amount]), 0.0) AS [Amount], COUNT(*) AS [Count]
FROM [Refunds] AS [r]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [o].[Id], [o].[OrganizationName]
    FROM [Organizations] AS [o]
    WHERE [o].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t] ON [r].[OrganizationId] = [t].[Id]
